# Forge

> Production-grade AI coding toolkit for Claude Code. 7 slash commands, 9 skills, 3 agents. Model-adaptive ‚Äî works with any LLM.

## Install

```bash
npx claudepluginhub install forge
claude plugin install Prashantxo/forge
```

## Commands

- `/forge:review` ‚Äî Code + security review on current diff or PR
- `/forge:secure` ‚Äî OWASP Top 10 security audit
- `/forge:arch` ‚Äî Architecture review or design
- `/forge:tdd` ‚Äî TDD cycle ‚Äî failing tests first
- `/forge:docs` ‚Äî Generate documentation
- `/forge:refine` ‚Äî Simplify changed code without behavior change
- `/forge:eval` ‚Äî Define or run evals for AI features
- `/forge:standards` ‚Äî Coding standards review

## Skills

`review` `secure` `arch` `tdd` `agentic` `docs` `refine` `eval` `standards`

## Agents

- `forge-reviewer` ‚Äî Multi-dimensional code review
- `forge-architect` ‚Äî Architecture diagrams, ADRs, verdicts
- `forge-analyst` ‚Äî Deep research, adversarially verified

## Platform Support

Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor

## Source

https://github.com/Prashantxo/forge
